/usr/bin/c++ CMakeFiles/rpc_sync_test.dir/examples/rpc/rpc_sync_test.cc.o -o rpc_sync_test  -Wl,-rpath,/usr/local/lib libnetwork.a -lprotobuf -lpthread /usr/local/lib/libetcd-cpp-api.so /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libcpprest.so.2.10 /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libssl.so /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libcrypto.so /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libgpr.so /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libgrpc.so /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libgrpc++.so /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libprotobuf.so -lhiredis
